summary: PR #2371 merged dtk-template updates. The loaded diff shows one tooling change in tools/project.py: category progress output now reads fuzzy_match_percent from measures, defaulting to 0, and prints it before matched and linked percentages. The PR body also records a README.md conflict resolution where the upstream deleted README was kept because the template README did not apply, but README.md is not present in the loaded changed-file list or final diff.

key_files.role: Project tooling progress-report output; print_category now includes fuzzy match percentage in category summary output.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: tools/project.py print_category adds fuzzy_match_percent = measures.get("fuzzy_match_percent", 0)
raw_diff: progress_print string changed to include "{fuzzy_match_percent:.2f}% fuzzy"

key_files.role: Conflict-resolution note only; PR body says upstream deleted version was kept because generic template README did not apply.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text: Conflicts resolved - README.md kept upstream's version (deleted)
changed_files: README.md absent from loaded final changed-file metadata

what_changed.text: Merged latest changes from dtk-template template/main into master.
In tools/project.py print_category, added a fuzzy_match_percent local sourced from measures.get("fuzzy_match_percent", 0).
Changed the category progress line from reporting matched and linked percentages to reporting fuzzy, matched, and linked percentages.
PR body states a README.md conflict was resolved by keeping upstream's deleted README because the template's generic README did not apply.
A decomp-dev bot GALE01 report for base 76cae85 to head 43a64a2 said "No changes".

smart_moves.text: Used measures.get("fuzzy_match_percent", 0), matching the existing pattern for progress metrics and providing a safe default when the key is absent.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: nearby total_code, matched_code, matched_code_percent, total_data, matched_data, matched_data_percent all use measures.get(..., 0)

smart_moves.text: Kept the project-specific README conflict resolution out of the final diff, according to the loaded changed-file metadata, while documenting the conflict in the PR body.

naming_conventions.text: Progress metric variable names in tools/project.py follow the measures key directly, e.g. fuzzy_match_percent mirrors measures["fuzzy_match_percent"].

review_feedback.text: No human review comments were present in the loaded slice.
